  as={"h1"}

  children={"Oznámení o podání žádosti"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/partner/notification/endpoint"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Informujte partnera o změnách v aplikaci.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"notificationContent":{"type":"object","properties":{"applicationId":{"type":"string","description":"Primární identifikátor aplikace"},"applicationStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATED","PRESCORED","APPROVED","VERIFICATION","ALTERNATIVE","CONFIRMED","REJECTED","CANCELLED"],"description":"Stav žádosti"},"orderNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Číslo objednávky (interní pro e-shop)"},"orderStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","PAID","CANCELLED","TERMINATED"],"description":"Stav objednávky"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Částka v menších jednotkách (150000 představuje 1 500) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Měna částky [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Je povolena pouze místní měna (CZK v České republice a EUR na Slovensku)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Aktuální záloha stanovená zákazníkem"},"notificationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Čas, kdy bylo oznámení vytvořeno (používá formátování [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601))"},"sequenceNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Číslo pořadí oznámení"}},"required":["applicationId","applicationStatus","notificationDate","sequenceNumber"],"description":"Obsah oznámení"},"sentDate":{"type":"string","description":"Čas odeslání oznámení (používá formátování [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601))"},"checksum":{"type":"string","description":"Kontrolní součet zprávy - výsledek HMAC s SHA512 (používá se tajný klíč)"}},"required":["notificationContent","sentDate","checksum"],"example":{"notificationContent":{"applicationId":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","applicationStatus":"CONFIRMED","orderNumber":"AA234","orderStatus":"TO_SHIP","downPayment":{"value":150000,"currency":"CZK"},"notificationDate":"2020-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","sequenceNumber":1},"sentDate":"2020-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","checksum":"f61c69a259b702d564b2032e554984dec3b713ff7bdde17fcb727d403ea0d730816f46ad2bbc06a1914225d5dfba0396927dbf1b0698081814877b5486950a15"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"204":{"description":"Žádný obsah","headers":{}},"400":{"description":"Nesprávná žádost","headers":{}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
